svg.title: Comparison between 10 agents debating and the Henge structure (GitHub palette)
svg.desc: Side-by-side diagram styled to match GitHub dark mode, contrasting a group debate of 10 agents with Henge's structured dissent: 9 isolated advisors, a blind tenth, and a cross-lab eleventh.
svg.text: Debate: the group contaminates itself. Whoever speaks first anchors the rest.
Dissent erodes under simulated social pressure. The result is an average.
Henge: forced isolation · blind dissenter · arbiter from a different lab.
The output is a map: where there's agreement, where it cracks, what's missing.
